title: The Father of Indian Engineering! #engineering #history #science #unsungheroes #hyderabad #mysore
description:
The Man Who Made Engineering India’s Strength | Sir M. Visvesvaraya Story

Most people in India do engineering and then find their passion—but for Sir M. Visvesvaraya, engineering was the passion that built a nation. 🏗️

In this video, we dive into the legendary life of the man who:

~ Defied British hierarchy to become a global icon.

~ Solved the Indus river water crisis with "out-of-the-box" thinking.

~ Built the massive KRS Dam using "Surki" when cement wasn't available.

~ Designed flood protection for Hyderabad that stands strong even today.

From a small village in Mysore to becoming the architect of modern India’s planning, his 101-year journey is a lesson in grit and vision. 🌟

Watch till the end to see how he helped PM Nehru at the age of 92!

If you found this inspiring, don't forget to Like, Share, and Subscribe for more stories of Indian legends.
